title: Dimitar's Flight to Cadasori
summary: Dimitar, a flying dragonette, embarks on a journey to a school called Cadasori with his mother. Along the way, they encounter a car full of cats before arriving at their destination. There, Dimitar meets his teacher, Izzy, and begins a creative new lesson in the art of beadwork.

highlightQuote.text: They flap! Flap, flap, flap, flap, flap, flap, flap. That means flying.

transcript.text: I'm ready.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Izzy
transcript.text: Stars and stars, please gather stars.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Do you want to turn off the light?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: There's the stars. All right. Since where do you want to sit? I want to sit in a lap.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I want to sit in your lap.
Oh good. I'll sit right here where you're standing and then you can go on my lap.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Dimitar?
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Yes?
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Dimitar's mother said, "Dimitar, it's another school day."
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Oh boy!
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Let's go to Cadasori.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Okay. Got to pack your backpack.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Oh okay, backpack, backpack. Also your lunchbox.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Yep. Okay, I think I got everything. Let's go. Now, how do they get there? Do they take a car or do they fly or something else?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: They flap! Flap, flap, flap, flap, flap, flap, flap. That means flying.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And what do they see on their way to Cadasori?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Ginger, Garfield, and Alexander and Jane and Ginger.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And what are they doing?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: They're just driving.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: They drive to Cadasori, I see. Now who drives the car?
Jane's the mother.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Oh, Jane's the mother, I see. And who is faster? The flying dragonettes or the driving cats?
The cats.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: The cats are faster? Oh.
No, no, they are slower, the dragons are faster.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: And so, Dimitar and his mom went flap, flap, flap through the sky and they flew right over Jane's car because she was driving all the other cats to Cadasori. And then they landed. And where do they land at Cadasori?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: In the parking lot.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: They land in the parking lot.
And then and then everyone was in a hurry at the same time with Dimitar.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Oh, so what happened? What were they in a hurry for?
School!
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Oh, they were in a hurry for school. Now what's it like when they get to the door? What happens?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: The door opens and there pops Izzy.
Oh, Izzy's there? Is Izzy the teacher?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah. "Hello friends!"

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, "Hi teacher Izzy," said Dimitar. What special things are we going to do at Cadasori today?
Go to the planet map.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Yeah, we did that yesterday. That was great. Or maybe it was the day before.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Hmm, Dimitar, what work would you like to do? Necklace?
Oh yes, some beadwork would be great. Maybe snow sculptures or snow-canos or...
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: There isn't snow-canos in the classroom. Maybe when we go on the playground.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: On the playground. Oh, okay. Or paper flowers? Could we do that? Or gratitude vessels?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Hmm, what kind of work might we do today, do you think? We might do beadwork. Let's do beadwork! These beads aren't shiny, but they're cool.
I do like beads, says Dimitar. Okay, what do I do first?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: First rule is to please, please someone has to cut the string.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Ah, well you know dragonettes have very sharp teeth. I could just bite it. Here, watch this. Chomp! And Dimitar bit the string right at the right spot with his sharp teeth.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: But that's too loud, Dimitar. Well, anyway we got to get a real piece.
Oh, no we're not going to do real beads during stars and stories, let's just pretend, okay?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: But we gotta do beads!
Well, we're telling a story about Dimitar doing beads. We're not really doing beads.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: But I want to do beads. I'm disappointed. I just want to do beads.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: It's interesting how the flashlight makes the beads glow, I like that. Well, we could do a little beading in the morning if there's time.
No, I want to do beads now!
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Do you want to do that instead of the rest of stars and stories?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah.
Okay, we'll stop stars and stories.
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: As long as we can keep talking to Dimitar. Dimitar...

characters.name: Dimitar
characters.description: A sharp-witted resident of a circular island castle, this two-century-old purple dragonet carries a pirate’s salt-crusted legacy and a fierce devotion to his salvaged library. Formerly of the Cadasori galleries, Seeker’s grumpy companion now roams the deep to save his ancestral shores, though a recent volcanic disturbance has left him uncharacteristically sickened and frail. Driven by habit and a tireless appetite for fish, he bickers incessantly over snacks while guarding his remaining volumes with a brooding, protective intensity.

characters.name: Dimitar's mother
characters.description: Dimitar's mother who flies him to school.

characters.name: Ginger
characters.description: A soft, round, and silver-coated feline, this exceptionally fluffy educator is one of Minnie and Mickey’s own kittens grown into a figure of quiet authority. Known for daintily distributing napkins with velvet paws and commuting to school behind the wheel, the gray-furred teacher balances his role on Nana’s welcoming committee with a life of polite, helpful service. Whether presiding over his humble sanctuary—the very cage Seeker once coveted—or sustaining himself on crunchy kibble and savory wet food, he remains a steady presence, most recently seen trading his classroom duties for the shadows of a secret closet hideout alongside Garfield.

characters.name: Garfield
characters.description: Minnie and Mickey’s intrepid kitten is a seasoned morning commuter, navigating the school run to reach Seeker’s sanctuary for heavy napping and premium kibble. A social fixture known for sharing twilight dinners with Ginger or waiting expectantly at Nana’s for a warm welcome, they occasionally trade their public life for the quiet solitude of a closet, sequestering themselves away with a treasured hoard of toys.

characters.name: Alexander
characters.description: A poised driver and student at Ginger Catasorry, this feline friend to Dimetar and Scratch Cat manages a digital Tamagotchi empire from the confines of a lunchbox. After recently representing Silver during the playdate, their steady paw was led far from the morning commute into the treacherous depths of the dark forest, where they navigated the shadows alongside Jane.

characters.name: Jane
characters.description: Dimetar’s matronly childhood companion is a kindhearted cat and daring ship’s pilot, a friend to Finn, Isabella, and Scratch Cat who navigates the expedition toward Mouse Castle and the road to Cadasori. Her cockpit is a warm sanctuary distinguished by a "love you" sticker and a cabin teeming with whiskered passengers, reflecting the same tenderness she first offered Silver. Though she maintains a bold pace, she is easily swayed by snacks at Seeker’s house or waylaid within the tangled depths of the dark forest. An adventurous spirit with whimsical desires, she currently dreams of a special little hat adorned with rainbow feathers, glitter, and a miniature fishy pond to crown her nautical ensemble.

characters.name: Isabella
characters.description: A towering Dimatar scholar and alchemist of Atsukeeseet, Mama Izzy is a clever kiddo at heart and a steadfast guardian of rooftop gardens and intricate dollhouses. Gifted with the power of flight, she navigates the open heights with aquatic grace, her massive frame often shielded by a special protective metal that glimmers even as she descends into the shadows. As a resourceful quartermaster, she employs red flashlights, gold-laced slimes, and pipe cleaners to mend a Lanternshark’s failing light, yet her generosity remains her hallmark; she freely shares her vast library, brokers homes for dragons, and teaches others to find the resonance in their own voices. Her most profound magic resides in her vast, soft blanket—a sanctuary of ultimate coziness—where she remains a brave, quick-witted protector to all who honor her singular request for absolute silence.

places.name: Cadasori
places.description: A school where both dragonettes and cats attend classes.

places.name: Parking lot
places.description: The area where Dimitar and his mother land after their flight.

places.name: Classroom
places.description: The place where the students work on planet maps and beadwork.

places.name: Playground
places.description: An outdoor area where students might make snow-canos.
